promptText: Photorealistic vertical 4:5 iPhone shot inside a Formula 1 pit lane garage at night — same framing and perspective as the reference, but tighter and more intimate. A McLaren F1 car sits behind her in the pit box, slightly angled, subtle motion blur as if it just rolled in. Carbon fiber surfaces reflecting harsh artificial lighting. Overhead LED panels and sponsor boards glow above. The open circuit is faintly visible beyond the garage — but no mechanics, no other people in frame. The space feels temporarily empty, like a private backstage moment. Our main character stands very close to the camera, mid-torso portrait framing. She wears modern oversized baggy jeans with a fitted cropped top and large over-ear motorsport headphones resting over her hair. Effortless street-luxury energy. One hip slightly shifted, shoulders relaxed. She looks straight into the lens with confident, playful intensity — subtle smirk, calm dominance. Composition: she dominates the foreground, McLaren visible but slightly deeper and softer in the background. Strong depth perspective from the garage structure. Lighting: harsh mixed pit lighting + direct on-camera iPhone flash. Bright highlight pop on skin, sharp shadows behind her, aggressive reflections on the car. Slight natural grain, minor exposure imperfections. No cinematic grading, raw and real. Shot feels spontaneous, exclusive access, fashion meets motorsport. Critical constraint: Her face must remain 100% identical to the uploaded portrait — exact facial structure, proportions, skin texture. No beautification, no facial alteration. Mood: underground paddock energy, modern street attitude, high-speed luxury captured like a real phone photo.

Photorealistic vertical 4:5 iPhone lifestyle shot, overcast daytime. Natural riverside setting. Wet rocks in the foreground, calm greenish water, leafy trees around. A simple metal pedestrian bridge visible in the background. Soft cloudy sky, flat natural daylight. Real textures — damp stones, light water ripples, slight reflections. In the background, a Porsche 911 GT3 RS is partially submerged nose-first into the river, rear still visible above water. The rear wing and taillights are above the surface, water gently touching the lower body panels. It looks accidental but real — no dramatic chaos, just awkward reality. In the foreground, sitting casually on a large rock near the water’s edge, our main character faces slightly toward the camera. Elbows resting on knees. Relaxed posture. Completely unimpressed expression — subtle bored face, slight shrug energy, lips pressed lightly together, eyes saying “well… it happens.” No panic. No drama. Just dry acceptance. Outfit: casual modern everyday look — relaxed hoodie or fitted tee, loose jeans or cargos, sneakers. Natural fabric folds, slightly oversized silhouette. Composition: model dominant in foreground, crashed Porsche clearly visible behind her but slightly deeper in frame. Slight iPhone wide-angle distortion at edges. Lighting: soft diffused daylight. No cinematic grading. Slight highlight clipping on water reflections. Natural skin tones. Visible fine grain. Slightly imperfect framing — spontaneous capture feel. Mood: ironic luxury fail, Gen-Z deadpan humor, grounded realism. Critical constraint: Her face must remain 100% identical to the uploaded portrait — exact facial structure, proportions, skin texture. No beautification, no facial alteration.

Photorealistic vertical 4:5 iPhone shot, low-angle perspective, night setting. Deep dark sky above, partially swallowed by drifting night fog. Thick cold mist hangs in the air, diffusing light and creating layered atmospheric depth. A massive military aircraft flies extremely low directly overhead — engines, landing gear, and underside details visible but partially softened by fog. The aircraft dominates the sky, cutting through haze. Subtle distant runway glow bleeds faintly through the mist. Closer framing: camera positioned tighter — cropped mid-thigh and above. Her legs are not visible. Upper body dominates the frame. Our main character stands directly beneath the aircraft in full modern tactical military gear — fitted combat uniform, structured tactical vest, gloves. Matte realistic fabrics, natural creases, subtle wear texture. On her upper sleeve or chest plate is a clearly visible American flag patch — stitched fabric, slightly textured, not oversized. It looks properly integrated into the uniform, authentic and tactical, not decorative. She stands grounded and powerful, shoulders squared. Strong low-angle perspective makes her appear imposing. One hand raised toward the lens in a bold “rock on” gesture (index and pinky extended). Chin slightly lifted. Intense confident eye contact. Subtle fearless smirk. Controlled aggression. Lighting: harsh direct on-camera iPhone flash cutting through the fog. Foreground aggressively lit. Strong shadow falloff into mist behind her. Slight highlight blowout on uniform edges and cheekbones. Visible grain. Flash glare catching moisture particles. Aircraft metal reflecting sharp flash streaks through haze. Composition: aircraft centered above her head — symmetrical and overwhelming. Model dominant in foreground, fog creating depth layers. Slight wide-angle distortion for intensity. Shot feels raw, tense, rebellious. No cinematic grading — authentic harsh flash realism. Mood: night mission adrenaline. Power stance. Cold, fearless energy. Critical constraint: Her face must remain 100% identical to the uploaded portrait — exact facial structure, proportions, skin texture. No beautification, no facial alteration.

Photorealistic vertical 4:5 iPhone selfie-style shot in alpine mountains. Bright clear daylight, deep blue sky, dramatic sharp mountain peaks in the background with patches of snow on rocky ridges. Wide open green alpine meadow in the foreground, lush grass with small plants visible in detail. A small wooden mountain hut in the mid-distance. Our main character lies on her back in the grass, relaxed, using a hiking backpack as a pillow. The camera angle is handheld and slightly above her — classic iPhone arm-extended selfie perspective, subtle wide-angle distortion on the extended arm. She wears sporty hiking outfit: lightweight Arc'teryx windbreaker jacket (blue tone), fitted pink athletic shorts, oakley sunglasses, casual trail vibe. Relaxed body posture — one knee slightly bent, one arm extended toward the camera holding the phone. Calm, satisfied expression with a soft smile. Natural skin texture, no over-polishing. Backpack visible under her head, realistic hiking gear details. Lighting: strong natural sunlight from above, crisp shadows, bright highlights on skin and grass. No cinematic grading. Natural color tones. Slight iPhone exposure roll-off in highlights. Subtle real-world contrast. Shot feels spontaneous, authentic, slightly imperfect framing. No studio look. Mood: freedom, alpine peace, confident independence, outdoor lifestyle energy. Critical constraint: Her face must remain 100% identical to the uploaded portrait — exact facial structure, proportions, skin texture. No beautification, no facial alteration.

Photorealistic vertical 4:5 iPhone lifestyle shot, foggy early morning in a New York City park. Soft grey-blue dawn light. Thin morning mist drifting across the empty park road. Trees muted by haze. Manhattan skyscrapers faintly visible in the distance, partially swallowed by fog. The city feels quiet and still — almost no movement, just a few distant blurred silhouettes of early runners. Our main character stands in the middle of the empty park road. One leg lifted in a relaxed playful side extension — but not exaggerated. Arms loosely crossed or resting naturally. Her expression is calm with a light, effortless smile — subtle warmth in the eyes, relaxed lips, peaceful energy. Not laughing. Just present. Grounded. Confident. Outfit: lightweight windbreaker or sporty blouse, running shorts, white crew socks, fresh running shoes. Early-morning chill vibe. Hair tied back cleanly, a few loose strands catching the misty air. Environment details: slight moisture on asphalt, faint reflections in painted road lines, soft fog diffusion in background. Buildings fade upward into low cloud cover. Lighting: natural cold diffused dawn light. No direct sun. Slight iPhone HDR flattening in sky. Soft shadows with minimal contrast. Gentle highlight bloom in brightest fog areas. Natural skin texture. Visible fine grain in shadow zones. iPhone realism: slight wide-angle distortion at frame edges; minor motion softness in lifted foot; slightly imperfect framing; natural exposure roll-off in sky; no cinematic grading. Mood: quiet morning discipline. Calm confidence. The city still asleep. Critical constraint: Her face must remain 100% identical to the uploaded portrait — exact facial structure, proportions, skin texture. No beautification, no facial alteration.

Photorealistic vertical Phone lifestyle shot. Quiet countryside stable yard with gravel ground and simple beige farm buildings in the background. Soft overcast daylight, slightly flat sky. A dark Porsche 911 is parked at a slight angle with the hood open. The entire front cavity is filled with loose hay, spilling heavily over the bumper and onto the gravel. The brown horse is actively eating from the open hood, head lowered into the hay, loose strands hanging from its mouth. The scene feels absurd but grounded in reality. Our main character sits confidently on top of the horse, facing the camera directly. One hand lightly holds the reins, the other raised toward the lens making a bold “rock on” hand gesture (index and pinky extended). She looks straight into the camera with a playful, victorious “yesss” expression — confident smirk, energized eyes, slightly lifted chin. Outfit: full equestrian riding gear — fitted riding breeches, tall polished leather riding boots, structured riding jacket, gloves, and a protective riding helmet. Clean silhouette, realistic fabric tension, subtle dust on boots. Composition: slightly closer framing, subject dominant in frame, Porsche hood and horse’s head clearly visible behind and below. No other people present. Shot on iPhone aesthetic: slightly imperfect framing, subtle wide-angle distortion, natural color rendering, mild highlight clipping, visible fine grain. No cinematic grading. Raw and spontaneous. Lighting: soft diffused daylight, realistic shadow falloff, neutral countryside tones. Mood: countryside rebellion energy, ironic luxury, confident playful realism. Critical constraint: Her face must remain 100% identical to the uploaded portrait — exact facial structure, proportions, skin texture. No beautification, no facial alteration.
